# DocSmith for Ansible `example-role-mixed-entry-points` README (for testing)

**This is a mock Ansible role intended for testing purposes only and is not a fully functional role.**

Its `argument_specs.yml` combines a `main` entry point (short, historical anchor scheme) with an additional `install` entry point (entry-point-prefixed anchors), including `O(...)` cross-references between the two.
